title: Access, extract and monitor water for irrigation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Access, extract and monitor water for irrigation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine regulatory requirements for water licences and/or access accounts

pcs.text: Confirm water sources available to the property to be irrigated and identify the authorities that manage and/or regulate water sources and delivery infrastructure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm water sources available to the property to be irrigated and identify the authorities that manage and/or regulate water sources and delivery infrastructure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm water sources available to the property to be irrigated and identify the authorities that manage and/or regulate water sources and delivery infrastructure.

pcs.text: Identify water system to be used and associated regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify water system to be used and associated regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify water system to be used and associated regulations.

pcs.text: Identify water licences and/or water account types that may be used to access and extract water for irrigation for the property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify water licences and/or water account types that may be used to access and extract water for irrigation for the property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify water licences and/or water account types that may be used to access and extract water for irrigation for the property.

pcs.text: Identify regulations, conditions and/or other requirements related to holding and operating a water licence and/or a water account for the property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify regulations, conditions and/or other requirements related to holding and operating a water licence and/or a water account for the property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify regulations, conditions and/or other requirements related to holding and operating a water licence and/or a water account for the property.

pcs.text: Identify, as a private diverter, water entitlements and allocations, water licence and/or water types accessible, infrastructure, delivery risks and yearly costs required to access water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, as a private diverter, water entitlements and allocations, water licence and/or water types accessible, infrastructure, delivery risks and yearly costs required to access water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, as a private diverter, water entitlements and allocations, water licence and/or water types accessible, infrastructure, delivery risks and yearly costs required to access water.

pcs.text: Identify, as an irrigator in an irrigation network, water licence and/ or water types accessible, temporary and/ or annual water, delivery risks and yearly costs required to access water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, as an irrigator in an irrigation network, water licence and/ or water types accessible, temporary and/ or annual water, delivery risks and yearly costs required to access water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, as an irrigator in an irrigation network, water licence and/ or water types accessible, temporary and/ or annual water, delivery risks and yearly costs required to access water.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine regulatory requirements for water licences and/or access accounts

elements.title: Implement water deliveries as a private diverter

pcs.text: Confirm private diverter's water licence and access conditions related to water share (allocation), allocation account, reporting requirements, tradeable water, potential carryover, and where and/or how the water will be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm private diverter's water licence and access conditions related to water share (allocation), allocation account, reporting requirements, tradeable water, potential carryover, and where and/or how the water will be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm private diverter's water licence and access conditions related to water share (allocation), allocation account, reporting requirements, tradeable water, potential carryover, and where and/or how the water will be used.

pcs.text: Check pump, water meter and other infrastructure are compliant with regulatory requirements and ready for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pump, water meter and other infrastructure are compliant with regulatory requirements and ready for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pump, water meter and other infrastructure are compliant with regulatory requirements and ready for operation.

pcs.text: Monitor weather conditions and forecasts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weather conditions and forecasts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weather conditions and forecasts.

pcs.text: Confirm delivery times and prepare to extract water during time window
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm delivery times and prepare to extract water during time window?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm delivery times and prepare to extract water during time window.

pcs.text: Extract water within licence conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Extract water within licence conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Extract water within licence conditions.

pcs.text: Check metering, complete reporting if required, and track overall extraction against licence conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check metering, complete reporting if required, and track overall extraction against licence conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check metering, complete reporting if required, and track overall extraction against licence conditions.

pcs.text: Monitor water account balance and seasonal allocation announcements and ensure compliance with extraction limits
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor water account balance and seasonal allocation announcements and ensure compliance with extraction limits?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor water account balance and seasonal allocation announcements and ensure compliance with extraction limits.

pcs.text: Protect pumps if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect pumps if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect pumps if required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Implement water deliveries as a private diverter

elements.title: Implement water deliveries as part of an irrigation network

pcs.text: Confirm water extraction conditions, related to water share (entitlement and/or allocation), allocation account, reporting requirements, allowable tradeable water and potential carryover, and where and/or how the water will be used3.2 Confirm there is sufficient water in account to place order, and source additional water if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm water extraction conditions, related to water share (entitlement and/or allocation), allocation account, reporting requirements, allowable tradeable water and potential carryover, and where and/or how the water will be used3.2 Confirm there is sufficient water in account to place order, and source additional water if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm water extraction conditions, related to water share (entitlement and/or allocation), allocation account, reporting requirements, allowable tradeable water and potential carryover, and where and/or how the water will be used3.2 Confirm there is sufficient water in account to place order, and source additional water if required.

pcs.text: Monitor weather conditions and forecasts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weather conditions and forecasts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weather conditions and forecasts.

pcs.text: Monitor lead times and place order for water
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor lead times and place order for water?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor lead times and place order for water.

pcs.text: Check meter and other water receival infrastructure is ready for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check meter and other water receival infrastructure is ready for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check meter and other water receival infrastructure is ready for operation.

pcs.text: Confirm delivery times and prepare to extract water during time window
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm delivery times and prepare to extract water during time window?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm delivery times and prepare to extract water during time window.

pcs.text: Extract water according to irrigation network conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Extract water according to irrigation network conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Extract water according to irrigation network conditions.

pcs.text: Check metering, complete reporting if required and track overall extraction against account conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check metering, complete reporting if required and track overall extraction against account conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check metering, complete reporting if required and track overall extraction against account conditions.

pcs.text: Confirm and complete ongoing reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and complete ongoing reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and complete ongoing reporting requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement water deliveries as part of an irrigation network

elements.title: Conduct end of season review and commence preparation for next season

pcs.text: Compare actual water delivered to water ordered
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare actual water delivered to water ordered?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare actual water delivered to water ordered.

pcs.text: Complete water delivery process confirming shut off and final automated procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete water delivery process confirming shut off and final automated procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete water delivery process confirming shut off and final automated procedures.

pcs.text: Identify water usage trends for current season
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify water usage trends for current season?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify water usage trends for current season.

pcs.text: Conduct equipment and infrastructure checks and maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct equipment and infrastructure checks and maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct equipment and infrastructure checks and maintenance.

pcs.text: Complete final regulatory reporting as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete final regulatory reporting as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete final regulatory reporting as required.

pcs.text: Complete end of year water balance, including any carryover
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete end of year water balance, including any carryover?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete end of year water balance, including any carryover.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Conduct end of season review and commence preparation for next season

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
